title: neomolina paniculata
intro: Neomolina paniculata, also known as Mexican prickly poppy, is a flowering plant native to Mexico. It is a member of the poppy family and has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to relieve pain and reduce inflammation. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers contain compounds that have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, providing health benefits such as reducing anxiety and improving sleep. Neomolina paniculata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
